title: One New York Night
writer: Edward Childs Carpenter, Walter C. Hackett, Frank Davis
actors: Franchot Tone, Una Merkel, Conrad Nagel
plot: Foxhall Ridgeway, arriving in New York City from the West, stumbles onto a murder in the hotel room next to his. He gets tangled up into the affair, and with the aid of Phoebe, the hotel telephone operator who takes a liking to hi...
